name: Beefy Polenta Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a square baking dish, 8x8x2 inches.
2. Mix cornmeal and cold water in a 1 1/2-quart saucepan.
3. Stir in boiling water and salt. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils; reduce heat.
4. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally; remove from heat.
5. Stir in Parmesan cheese until smooth. Let cool for 5 minutes.
6. Spread evenly on the bottom and up the sides of the pan. Cover and refrigerate at least 4 hours until completely firm.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Bake the cornmeal mixture uncovered in the pan for 15 minutes.
9. Cook beef in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat for about 5 minutes, stirring frequently, until brown; drain.
10. Stir in spinach, spaghetti sauce, and marjoram.
11. Spoon the beef mixture into the polenta shell. Cover and bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until heated through.
12. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese. Bake uncovered for about 5 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
13. Let stand for 10 minutes before cutting. Optionally, sprinkle with chopped Roma tomatoes.
